hero.title: AI for Psychologists
hero.description: Your virtual assistant supports mental health care by managing session bookings, reminders, progress notes, and follow-up care.

stats.label: Fewer missed appointments with automated reminders.
Reduced hours spent on scheduling and note-taking.
More patient continuing regular therapy sessions.

blocks.heading: Supportive, Confidential, and Always Professional
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that running a psychology practice requires compassion, precision, and confidentiality. Our AI Virtual Receptionist is designed to handle calls, manage bookings, and respond to inquiries with empathy and discretion — ensuring your clients always feel supported and respected.

blocks.heading: Focus on Clients, Not Calls
blocks.description: While you're in a session, your AI Receptionist answers calls instantly, provides information about appointment availability, and schedules or reschedules clients automatically. It can also handle sensitive queries with a calm and reassuring tone — ideal for practices where confidentiality and care are essential.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Call or Referral Again
blocks.description: Whether you're in session, writing notes, or out of the office, your AI Receptionist ensures every inquiry is handled promptly and professionally. It can provide details about your services (such as child psychology, couples counselling, trauma support, or workplace wellbeing), discuss available appointment times, and send reminders. You'll never lose a new client or referral because of a missed call again.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Psychologists Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by psychologists and mental health professionals across Australia. It's designed to sound natural, compassionate, and professional — creating a welcoming first impression for every client. By managing calls and appointments seamlessly, it helps you stay focused on client wellbeing while maintaining a modern, efficient practice.

card.heading: Comprehensive Notes and Follow-Up Management
card.description: After each session, psychologists can record voice memos that are automatically transcribed and summarized for easy reference. Session notes, documents, and follow-up reminders can all be securely uploaded and managed in one place. This ensures continuity of care, accuracy in record-keeping, and a smoother workflow for your practice.
